title: breynia orbicularis
intro: Breynia orbicularis, also known as the nine-star flower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to Australia and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Breynia orbicularis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. Breynia orbicularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
